page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Vivarium Collective is a registry for open-source Vivarium-compatible simulation modules. These can be wired together to generate novel multi-scale simulations, with the most appropriate algorithm for each biological mechanism.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Vivarium Collective is a registry for open-source Vivarium-compatible simulation modules. These can be wired together to generate novel multi-scale simulations, with the most appropriate algorithm for each biological mechanism.
